evals.prompt: Redesign the Blaze Sports Intel homepage hero and first three modules for launch week. Keep it serious, information-dense, and explicitly brand-tied.
Design a college baseball live scoreboard page for mobile-first scanning with dense game data. Require interaction states and contrast rationale.
Create visual direction for a Savant analytics dashboard in Next.js + Tailwind + Recharts + Framer Motion. Provide design spec before any code advice.
Give me visual direction for an editorial deep-dive page combining narrative and advanced baseball metrics without looking like a generic SaaS blog.
Define UI spec for a team detail page with schedule, form trend, key player panels, and data caveats. Keep BSI typography and token discipline strict.
